source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/09_HnVUE/92_인증 - FDA/참고샘플 - Aspenview/AspenView Cybersecurity Risk Management Metrics.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Cyber Security Risk Management Report for AspenView software documenting FMEA-based cybersecurity risks, controls, verification evidence, and residual acceptability.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports cybersecurity risk management documentation for AspenView software, including hazard analysis, risk controls, software verification evidence, and residual risk acceptability.
keyPoints: The document identifies potential failure modes within AspenView software and analyzes consequences of those failures.

Cybersecurity hazards include unauthorized access, account misuse, weak authentication, illegal software execution, information leakage or forgery, ransomware, unauthorized updates, missing logs, and communication denial or delay.

Risk controls include access control, authentication, multiple-access restriction, session termination, password rules, encryption, integrity checks, logging, threat alarms, and user manual response procedures.
Listed residual risk assessments are marked acceptable in the provided FMEA rows.

concepts.name: Access control and authentication
concepts.evidence: Implementation of access control and authentication function for each user through design change

concepts.name: Unauthorized access detection and restriction
concepts.evidence: Implementing unauthorized access detection and restriction function through design change

concepts.name: Automatic session termination
concepts.evidence: Implementation of automatic session termination function through design change

concepts.name: Password creation rules and masking
concepts.evidence: Password creation rule through design change Implementation of rules, encryption, masking, and no feedback

concepts.name: Encryption of transmitted information
concepts.evidence: Implementation of encryption function of transmitted information through design change

concepts.name: Update authentication
concepts.evidence: Implementation of authentication function when updating through design change

concepts.name: Integrity check
concepts.evidence: Implement integrity check function when updating through design change

concepts.name: System access and information management log
concepts.evidence: System access and information management through design change

concepts.name: Security threat detection alarm
concepts.evidence: Implementation of security threat detection alarm function through design change

concepts.name: Communication error detection and alarm
concepts.evidence: Communication error detection and alarm function implementation

evidence.claim: The document is titled Cyber Security Risk Management Report.
evidence.evidenceText: Cyber Security Risk Management Report

evidence.claim: The document number is AspenView-RMF.
evidence.evidenceText: Document No. AspenView-RMF

evidence.claim: The document revision is Revision No. 3.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision No. 3

evidence.claim: The model identified in the document is AspenView software.
evidence.evidenceText: Model : AspenView software

evidence.claim: The revision date shown in the document is 2024.09.01.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision Date. 2024.09.01

evidence.claim: The FMEA section identifies potential failure modes within AspenView software and analyzes consequences of those failures.
evidence.evidenceText: This is our step-by-step approach used to identify potential failure modes within AspenView software, and analyze the consequences of those failures.

evidence.claim: Unauthorized access to product information may manipulate image calibration data and lead to misdiagnosis, incorrect treatment, or deprivation of treatment opportunities.
evidence.evidenceText: Manipulation of image calibration data due to unauthorized access to information on this product

evidence.claim: The risk control for unauthorized access includes access control and authentication for each user.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of access control and authentication function for each user through design change

evidence.claim: Multiple simultaneous users on one account are controlled by a same-account multiple access restriction function.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of the same account multiple access restriction function through design change

evidence.claim: Unauthorized access attempts are controlled by unauthorized access detection and restriction functions.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementing unauthorized access detection and restriction function through design change

evidence.claim: The document specifies authentication when accessing through a network as a control for weak router or Wi-Fi-related stolen access rights.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of authentication function when accessing through network through design change

evidence.claim: Automatic session termination is used to reduce unauthorized account use when the user is away.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of automatic session termination function through design change

evidence.claim: Password-related controls include password creation rules, encryption, masking, and no feedback.
evidence.evidenceText: Password creation rule through design change Implementation of rules, encryption, masking, and no feedback

evidence.claim: The document uses ambiguous response messages to avoid revealing whether an ID exists during login.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementing the use of ambiguous expressions in response messages through design changes

evidence.claim: Only necessary services such as ports and permissions are activated to address unauthorized installation or illegal software execution.
evidence.evidenceText: Activate only necessary services (port, permission, etc.) through design change

evidence.claim: Encryption of transmitted information is used as a control for leakage or forgery of transmitted control or medical information.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of encryption function of transmitted information through design change

evidence.claim: For stored medical information forgery risks, the document specifies transmitting without storing medical information in the product.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of the function to transmit without storing medical information in this product through design change

evidence.claim: Ransomware infection is identified as a possible case where patient information cannot be viewed during treatment.
evidence.evidenceText: Ransomware infection Patient information cannot be viewed during treatment

evidence.claim: Unauthorized updates are controlled by authentication during updates.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of authentication function when updating through design change

evidence.claim: Updates with no guaranteed integrity are controlled by an integrity check function when updating.
evidence.evidenceText: Implement integrity check function when updating through design change

evidence.claim: Updates from any provider are controlled by an update provider authentication procedure function.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of update provider authentication procedure function through design change

evidence.claim: Absence of system log is addressed by system access and information management logging.
evidence.evidenceText: Verify system access and information management log function implementation with software verification data

evidence.claim: Executable files and configuration files without guaranteed integrity are controlled by an integrity check before execution.
evidence.evidenceText: Implementation of integrity check function before execution of executable file through design change

evidence.claim: Security threat detection alarm functions and user manual response procedures are controls for cybersecurity threat response.
evidence.evidenceText: Confirmation of security threat detection alarm function implementation with software verification data and provision of response procedures to users through user manual

evidence.claim: Communication service denial or delay is controlled by communication error detection, alarm functions, and user manual response procedures.
evidence.evidenceText: Confirmation of communication error detection and implementation of alarm functions with software verification data and provision of response procedures to users through user manual

evidence.claim: The provided FMEA rows show residual risk acceptability as acceptable.
evidence.evidenceText: Acceptable / Not allowed ... Acceptable
